{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Kazan Patriarch
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Bloodline (novel)|Bloodline]]
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Kazan Patriarch]]'s badge is carved with a shield.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10">''Bloodline'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
